title: The Disease and the Sacrifice
description: The Golden City and its bell become a promise between Noland and Calgara, giving the present-day battle its emotional weight.
scene: Across pages 15, 16, 17, this scene focuses on Calgara, Mont Blanc Noland, Musse, Shandia villager, Nola. The Golden City and its bell become a promise between Noland and Calgara, giving the present-day battle its emotional weight.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: Just when are you and your men,

dialogue.speaker: Musse
dialogue.text: D... Did we stay too long?

dialogue.speaker: Shandia villager
dialogue.text: Let's continue our work for now.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: So this is where you were...

summary: The Golden City and its bell become a promise between Noland and Calgara, giving the present-day battle its emotional weight.
